sources.title: Awesome ChatGPT Prompts
sources.description: A large collection of curated ChatGPT prompts covering many roles and use cases.
sources.author: f
sources.notes:
The main prompt file is prompts.csv with columns: act, prompt, for_devs, type, contributor.
Individual prompts can also be found in the repository's markdown files.

sources.title: System Prompts Collection
sources.description: Collection of system prompts leaked or shared from various AI products.
sources.author: jujumilk3
sources.notes:
Each prompt is stored as a markdown file. Useful as reference for prompt engineering
and understanding how commercial AI products structure their system prompts.
